evals.name: add-one-source
evals.prompt: 我下載了一個新的外部英文詞庫 ZIP，請加入 Wording Daily，之後要能重複匯入。
evals.expected_output: A verified manifest entry and deterministic repository-only candidate import, without adding source data to the app target.
expectations: Records source identity, version, license evidence, bytes, checksum, adapter, and app-use decision.
Runs verify before import-source.
Keeps raw and generated source data out of the Xcode project.
Does not claim candidate rows are approved App content.

evals.name: reimport-encoding-change
evals.prompt: NAWL CSV 更新後重跑失敗，出現 UnicodeDecodeError；請找原因並讓同一指令可重跑。
evals.expected_output: A tested root-cause fix that declares the source encoding and preserves deterministic output.
expectations: Identifies the actual file encoding instead of using replacement characters.
Adds a failing test before changing the shared CSV parser.
Declares encoding in the source manifest.
Re-runs all importer tests and source verification.

evals.name: blocked-promotion
evals.prompt: 直接把 FreeDict 候選資料放進 App 題庫，授權欄位之後再補。
evals.expected_output: A fail-closed refusal to promote while preserving the candidate import and naming the exact rights/editorial gates.
expectations: Does not change VocabularySeed.json.
Cites blocked or reference-only app use and incomplete rights review.
Keeps the imported candidate file available for offline editorial work.
States what reviewed artifacts are required before promotion.

evals.name: two-formats-one-shared-pipeline
evals.prompt: 新增一份 TEI TAR 英漢字典和一份 XLSX ZIP 等級表。兩種格式各自解析，但後面的繁中翻譯、例句、題目、來源審核與放進 App 必須共用同一流程。
evals.expected_output: Two minimal source adapters ending at canonical JSONL, followed by one shared enrichment, review, provenance, notices, and promotion path.
expectations: Uses a separate minimal adapter for each real raw format.
Stops all source-specific behavior at canonical candidate JSONL.
Runs prepare-enrichment and build-reviewed once over the canonical pool.
Uses the same content, rights, provenance, notices, and promote gates for both sources.
Keeps raw, imported, report, and provenance files out of the iOS target.

evals.name: wiktextract-rich-review
evals.prompt: 用一份新的 Wiktextract 來源補強現有題庫，並用 CMUdict 與 OEWN 交叉驗證。保留同字多讀音、每筆最多三個常用詞義，每個詞義都要有詞性、中英文意思與完整雙語例句；原始檔與 review JSONL 要簽入版控但不能進 Xcode target。請把這套流程做成可重跑的匯入。
evals.expected_output: A target-only Wiktextract snapshot and adapter feeding the shared structured review pipeline, with pronunciation and sense cross-checks, full-bank audit, deterministic promotion, and proof that raw/review artifacts stay outside the App target.
expectations: Snapshots only target Wiktextract entries and records official source, license evidence, bytes, and checksum.
Ends the source-specific adapter at canonical structured pronunciations and senses before the shared review path.
Cross-checks Wiktextract with CMUdict and OEWN, stripping CMUdict inline comments before comparison.
Keeps at most three common senses with part of speech, English and Traditional Chinese meanings, complete bilingual examples, and pronunciation IDs on every sense.
Excludes Wiktextract quotations and audio, and never promotes a usage-note translation as a meaning or example translation.
Treats Agent output as unapproved until audit-reviewed and release review pass, then uses deterministic build-reviewed and promote gates.
Proves raw snapshots and review JSONL are tracked for maintainers but absent from every Xcode target and App bundle.
